title: CRAYOLA Washable Watercolour Paint Palette | Includes 12 Watercolour Paints and 1 Paintbrush | Craft Kit for Kids | For Ages 3+
features: This kids paint set includes 12 Crayola Watercolours In classic colours, as well as a Paintbrush to dive right in
Encourage fun creativity with a washable watercolour paint set
Perfect for on the go or for getting creative at home
description: From the manufacturer CRAYOLA PAINT A paintbrush in hand is like magic to kids. The possibilities of what they can create by using their imaginations are endless! At Crayola, we offer a ton of different colourful paints and painting supplies to keep your child inspired and excited about art. Our nontoxic paints are perfect to use at home, the classroom, playroom or anywhere else your little artist wants to paint and create. In addition to traditional brushes, our paints can also be used with stamps and sponges ‒ both fun tools to create unique patterns and designs. Another great aspect of Crayola paints is that they are washable, so mums and dads can breathe easy no matter how messy a paint session might get. We also offer several all-in-one kits, a great choice for kids just getting started with painting. All our paint sets and products make great gifts no matter age or experience level!
